title: Acronyms and Frequently Asked Questions
introduction: This reference explains common terms used throughout the hero build guide.
The FAQ also covers several recurring questions about exclusive equipment, gems and highlighted recommendations.

acronyms.description: A role used for heroes that act as the team's main damage dealers.
Heroes or effects that prevent enemies from performing certain actions.
A hero intended to absorb damage and protect the team's damage dealers.
A hero that heals or affects the team in a way that is not a constant stat buff.
A hero that removes enemy buffs or lowers enemy stats.
A hero that increases allied stats or provides another persistent enhancement.
Game modes that involve fighting teams controlled by other players.
Game modes that do not involve fighting other players.
The attack used when the hero's energy bar reaches 100.

faq.question: Why are some heroes recommended for exclusive equipment level 31 instead of 30?
answer: At level 31, the third stat provided by the hero's exclusive equipment increases.
For example, Alcazar has 15% additional Armor PEN at level 30. At level 31, that third exclusive-equipment stat increases to 20%.

faq.question: Why do some heroes have no recommended dark gems?
answer: Some heroes do not benefit greatly from any of the stats provided by dark gems.
When no specific dark gem is recommended, Speed is usually a reasonable fallback.

faq.question: Why are some recommendations highlighted in grey in the original guide?
answer: The grey highlights show the artifacts and stigmata personally used by the guide author on main heroes.
The highlights represent how those items are normally kept in the author's inventory, not necessarily the optimal Union War arrangement.
An optimized Union War version would highlight Hunter's Scythe for many more DPS heroes.
